title: Caldera - System Owner and User Discovery (Windows)
description: Detects commands used to discover the current system owner and logged-in users. Caldera T1033 emulation runs whoami, query user, and PowerShell Get-LocalUser to determine privilege context, active sessions, and user account details immediately after gaining access to a Windows endpoint.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (('Process Name' like '*\\whoami.exe') or ('Process Name' like '*\\query.exe' and ('Command Line' like '*user*' or 'Command Line' like '*session*')) or (('Command Line' like '*Get-LocalUser*' or 'Command Line' like '*Get-LocalGroup*' or 'Command Line' like '*[System.Security.Principal.WindowsIdentity]::GetCurrent*' or 'Command Line' like '*$env:USERNAME*')) or (('Process Name' like '*\\net.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\\net1.exe') and 'Command Line' like '*user*'))
falsepositives: Help desk automation querying session state
